newReleases.name: Minitris
newReleases.desc:
Rediscover the timeless puzzle classic that took the world by storm!

Minitris is a minimalist falling-block puzzle with a vibrant twist. Designed for players of all ages—from toddlers to puzzle masters—Minitris strips away the complexity of traditional block games to focus on pure, addictive strategy.

Every block is a simple square, but the challenge lies in the color. Your mission? Match three or more blocks of the same color—horizontally, vertically, or diagonally—to clear the board and keep the game alive.

Why you’ll love Minitris:

Play in Seconds: With ultra-simple tap or swipe controls, you’ll be playing (and winning!) in no time.

Stress-Free Strategy: No complex shapes to rotate. Just pure color-matching fun.

Chasing the High Score: Earn big points with combo clears and multi-set matches. The faster you play, the more you earn!

A Piece of Gaming History: Originally born on DOS in 1989, Minitris has been refined over decades to provide the perfect casual experience.

The Legacy Continues
First released in 1989 and later a Windows favorite, Minitris reached 50 countries in its first 50 days. Decades later, the goal remains the same: a game simple enough for a child, yet deep enough for an adult.

newReleases.name: JACL Interactive Fiction
newReleases.desc:
JACL brings the golden age of text adventures to your iPad. There are no buttons to mash and no twitch reflexes required — you read where you are, type what you want to do ("open the door", "take the lantern", "go north"), and the story responds. It's interactive fiction the way it was meant to be: you and
your imagination, one sentence at a time.

The app comes with a shelf of ready-to-play adventures spanning several languages and moods — from a fantasy dungeon to a quiet stroll through Paris — so there's something to play the moment you open it.

FEATURES

• A built-in bookshelf of adventures, ready to play offline
• Never lose your place — every game auto-saves, so returning to the shelf and
  coming back drops you exactly where you left off
• Named save points for marking the moments you want to return to
• A tap-to-open map that charts the rooms you've explored
• Sound and music in games that support it
• Tap and hold any word to look it up in the dictionary
• Comfortable, adjustable serif reading — set your text size once and it sticks
• Light, Dark, or System appearance for the reading screen
• Designed for iPad, in portrait or landscape

WHO IT'S FOR

If you grew up with text adventures in the 1980s, this is your nostalgia machine. If you've never played one, it's the gentlest possible introduction to a whole genre of story-driven games. The bundled adventures range from family-friendly puzzles to mature, tongue-in-cheek action, so there's room to
grow into.

newReleases.name: Arrower: Arrow Logic Puzzle
newReleases.desc:
Every arrow wants out. Only one path is clear.
 
Arrower is a calm, brain-bending logic puzzle. Each arrow is a snake on the grid, pointing at the edge it wants to slide out through. But it can only leave if nothing is blocking its path. Clear the right arrow first and the board opens up. Clear the wrong one and you're stuck. Read the gridlock, find the order, set every arrow free.

Simple to learn, deeply satisfying to solve.

FEATURES
 - 2,500 hand-tuned levels across a campaign that grows with you
 - A fresh Daily Challenge every day, with streaks to keep
 - Three-star scoring  - beat par moves and finish with hearts to spare
 - A holding tray and other twists that bend the rules as you climb

NO PRESSURE
No timers. No lives that lock you out. No nagging. Solve at your own pace, whenever you want a quiet mental reset.
Free to play, with an optional one-time purchase to remove ads.

Think you can clear all 2,500?

newReleases.name: Orbinaut

One orb. Two rings. One tap.

Orbinaut is a pick-up-and-play arcade game about staying alive. Your orb races endlessly around glowing neon rings — tap anywhere to hop between lanes, dodge the spikes, and grab gems for bonus points. Every run starts gentle and gets faster, until one wrong hop ends it all.

Simple to learn, hard to master. Rounds last under two minutes, restarts are instant, and your high score is always on screen daring you to beat it.

HOW TO PLAY
• Tap anywhere to hop between the inner and outer ring
• Dodge the spikes — one touch ends your run
• Collect gems, grab the rare bonus star, and ride the shield
• Survive as the speed climbs and the rings shift colour

FEATURES
• One-touch controls anyone can pick up — great for all ages
• Daily Challenge: one shared board for the whole world, every day
• Level up every 20 points as the rings change colour and the pace rises
• REVERSE rounds that flip your direction (always with a warning!)

• Game Center leaderboards — take on the world's best Orbinauts
• 8 achievements to unlock
• High score and stats sync across your devices with iCloud
• Slick neon visuals, satisfying haptics and arcade sound
• Game controller support and iOS Game Mode
• No ads. No tracking. No waiting, no energy systems.

Can you beat 1000?

newReleases.name: Meowdoku!
newReleases.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

newReleases.name: Food Hunt: Pixel Puzzle
newReleases.desc:
Every level is a pixel art masterpiece. Your ants will devour it - one color at a time.

Food Hunt is a satisfying color sort puzzle where the puzzle board IS the art. Each level presents a hand-crafted pixel art image built entirely from colored blocks. Sort your ants by color, send them in, and watch them eat the picture clean - block by block, until the board is empty and the level is cleared.

HOW TO PLAY
The board is filled with a pixel art image - built entirely from colored blocks. Below the board: your holding slots and block stacks waiting to be tapped.

Tap a block stack to load your ants. They march up and devour every matching colored block in the image. Clear all colors - wipe the board completely - and you win.

But choose your order carefully:

- Holding slots are limited - wrong tap order fills them fast
- Stuck slots = ants can't move = game over
- Plan which color to clear first
- Eat every last block - board empty - level clear!

THE PIXEL ART IS THE PUZZLE
Forget collecting rewards after you win. In Food Hunt, the pixel art image is the challenge itself.

Every level is a different image, built from hundreds of colored blocks. Watch your ants devour it layer by layer, color by color, until nothing remains.

You don't unlock the art. You clear it. And that's exactly what makes it satisfying.

FEATURES
-  200+ color sort puzzle levels -  new images, new challenges
-  Cute ants with ASMR-quality chomping animations
-  Simple one-tap controls - play with one h

updates.name: Amaze GO!

Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy

- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge

· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus

updates.name: Pixel Flow!
updates.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
updates.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

updates.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
updates.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

Challenge your mind and compete in real-time crossword duels! 
Train your brain, expand your vocabulary, and outsmart opponents in thrilling word battles. Play live, score big, and climb the leaderboards in this action-packed crossword game!

Welcome to “Toon Blast,” a free match-3 adventure that combines fun and strategy. Join Bruno Bear, Cooper Cat, and Wally Wolf in blasting cubes and solving puzzles without Wi-Fi. This calming game is packed with addictive mini-games and challenges. Each level is a unique puzzle experience, offering a blend of fun and strategic gameplay. updates.name: Triple Match City
updates.desc:
Triple Match City - The Ultimate Hidden Objects Adventure!

Are you ready to sharpen your observation skills and test your focus in an exciting and fast-paced hidden objects game? In Triple Match City, your mission is simple yet thrilling: find hidden objects across expansive maps and match them in sets of 3 before the time runs out! Immerse yourself in this captivating scavenger hunt challenge that will keep your brain engaged and your eyes sharp.
Embark on a journey through beautifully designed maps filled with hundreds of hidden items waiting to be discovered. Every level brings a new challenge, with more intricate scenes, harder-to-find objects, and limited time to complete your goal. It’s a race against time—can you find all the objects before the clock runs out?

Key Features:
- Exciting Hidden Object Gameplay: Find and collect small objects scattered across massive, colorful maps. Match them in sets of 3 to clear them from the screen!
- Time-Based Challenges: Feel the thrill as you race against the clock to complete your tasks.
- Diverse Maps and Themes: Explore vibrant locations like crowded bustling cities, mysterious deserts, icelands, and more!
- Helpful Hints: Can’t spot an object? Use hints to reveal its location and keep moving forward.
- Zoom Functionality: Zoom in and out of the map to spot even the tiniest hidden objects.
- Relax or Challenge Yourself: Play casually to unwind, or take on harder levels to test your speed and accuracy.
- Frequent Updates: Enjoy

Welcome to Merge Mansion – the original merge puzzle game with cozy gameplay, epic adventures and high drama!

Restore a forgotten mansion to its former glory – and solve mysteries along the way! Can you uncover the secrets Grandma is hiding and reveal the truth behind the Boulton family’s past?

Unlock spaces and rooms in the garden and mansion by completing fun merge tasks. Collect clues, meet fascinating characters, and piece the story together one mystery at a time.

Relax into this cozy merge puzzle game packed with more twists and turns than Grandma’s knitting.

MATCH & MERGE
Merge matching items to upgrade, and use them to complete tasks. Enjoy the satisfaction of creating and discovering new items and chains!

RENOVATE & DECORATE
Restore the mansion and gardens to their former glory! Collect themed decorations and customize your home as you wish.

INVESTIGATE & SOLVE
Uncover hidden areas and combine clues to find out what secrets Grandma is hiding - how far down the mystery rabbit hole will you go?

EXCLUSIVE EVENTS
Play limited-time events to gain points, climb leaderboards, collect gorgeous decorations, and win big rewards!

Merge Mansion is the number one destination for a cozy mystery puzzle adventure - and it never gets boring! Download this free puzzle merge game and discover its secrets.

Welcome aboard, roving voyager.
Upon the shores lay the silent embers of a world during the Ebb Tide.
Desolated by the Lament, the erstwhile creations and earthly beings are left static.
But they strike back, strong enough to penetrate the silence.
Humanity has risen anew from the ashes of the apocalypse. 
And you, Rover, are poised for an adventure of Awakening.
Companions to meet, enemies to conquer, new powers to gain, hidden truths to unveil, and unseen spectacles to behold... A vast world of endless possibilities awaits. The choice rests in your hands. Be the answer, be the leader, and follow the sounds to arrive at a new future.
As Wuthering Waves echo endlessly, mankind set sail on a new journey.
Rise and embark on your odyssey, Rover.

Delve into an expansive world / Desolated by the Lament, civilization is born anew

updates.name: Among Us!
updates.desc:
A game of teamwork and betrayal ...in space! Play online with 4-15 players as you attempt to prep your spaceship for departure, but beware as one or more random players among the Crew are Impostors bent on killing everyone.

MASTER YOUR SOCIAL DEDUCTION SKILLS.
Crewmates win by completing all tasks or discovering and voting the Impostors off the ship. The Impostor can use sabotage to cause chaos, making for easier kills and better alibis. Optional roles create a whole new level of gameplay. Try out the Scientist, Engineer, Guardian Angel, or Shapeshifter to create chaos! Think you’re a master of deception? Only one way to find out!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR GAME.
Choose how you want to play! Change the number of Impostors, roles, tasks, player visibility, and more. Play in style as you change your Crewmates’ color, visor, nameplate, outfit, and hat. More customization options are planned to be continually added in.

PLAY WITH ANYONE.
Cross-platform play is supported. Play with friends (or enemies?) between PC, mobile, or console!

If you have any issues, visit us at: https://www.innersloth.com/faq/

updates.name: Castle Busters
updates.desc:
SMASH EVERY CASTLE. RULE EVERY ARENA.
Castle Busters is fast, loud, and unfair in the best way. Every brick breaks. Every shot counts. Draft 8 units, load your keep, and turn your rival's castle into a pile of rubble before they do it to you first. No grinding waves of bots. No 20-minute matches. Just real-time 1v1 PvP where one good angle wins the war.

DESTROY THE WALLS, NOT THE CLOCK
Matches are quick. Decisions are not. Pick your shot, read the enemy line, and fire. Every wall, tower and turret is destructible, so the map is never the same twice. Collapse a floor under an archer. Carve your own path, literally.

DRAFT YOUR SQUAD
Wrecker, Napalmer, Bomber, Scout, Fairy, Crow... Pick any 8. Each unit changes how you play, what angles you attack, and how you defend. Some builds are patient. Some are chaos. None of them are wrong if they win.

FORTIFY THE KEEP
Your castle is your army's home, shield, and weapon. Reinforce the walls that matter. Leave decoys. Bait your rival into breaking through somewhere they shouldn't. Defense isn't passive here, it's a trap.

THE FORGE
Upgrade your units. Strengthen your keep. Unlock new arenas with new hazards, new obstacles, new ways to break things. The deeper you go, the meaner the meta gets.

CLIMB THE LADDER
Climb your away towards Clash Colosseum. Arena by arena. Seasonal leaderboards. Rank matches against players who want your crown as badly as you want theirs. Only one castle stays standing. Sharpen your aim. Stack your squad. Cra
